summary: Completed final verification of Problem 0004 VWAP Absorption Reversion project. passed_tests: FINAL_REPORT.md exists and correctly records Problem 0004 as NOT_VALIDATED across strict cross-instrument holdout (MNQ, RTY, MYM, ES, MCL, MGC)

Pine script default mode is 'Warning/filter only' (line 19)
Pine script enablePaperStrategy defaults to false (line 29)

No live execution code found - script explicitly states 'Research/Paper Only' and 'not live execution'
No trading recommendation language - all alerts state 'Warning/filter only; not a trade recommendation'
README.md correctly documents repositioned use-case and NOT_VALIDATED status
